itir-statibaker-supermanager.claim: Supermanager monitor for StatiBaker local runsheet plus Kanboard projection roadmap; no direct file ownership beyond orchestration state.

statibaker-bridge-contract-manager.claim: Manager: harden the canonical local runsheet bridge contract and fixture expectations; may spawn up to six leaf workers.

statibaker-kanboard-adapter-manager.claim: Manager: implement the first Kanboard JSON-RPC dry-run/adapter surface under StatiBaker; may spawn up to six leaf workers.

statibaker-kanboard-local-manager.claim: Manager: discover the locally installed system Kanboard configuration safely and document/apply only non-secret integration assumptions; may spawn up to six leaf workers.

statibaker-sensiblaw-extraction-manager.claim: Manager: align SensibLaw StatiBaker task extraction/timeline probes with the local runsheet bridge shape; may spawn up to six leaf workers.

statibaker-runsheet-dashboard-manager.claim: Manager: surface runsheet/progress state in StatiBaker local dashboard/query views without making Kanboard canonical; may spawn up to six leaf workers.

statibaker-verification-governance-manag.claim: Manager: enforce docs/TODO/changelog/test governance, authority boundaries, and promotion gates for the Kanboard roadmap; may spawn up to six leaf workers.
